name: OpenAI Codex adapter
statusReason: All 7 gates pass as of 2026-05-15. Verification driven by two root-cause fixes uncovered during real-API verification: (1) Codex CLI's default model `gpt-5.2-codex` was retired from ChatGPT accounts 2026-04-14, fixed by updating the tier-to-model map to working models (gpt-5.2/5.3-codex/5.4); (2) Codex CLI hangs reading stdin even when the prompt is a positional arg, fixed by switching from execFile to spawn-with-stdin.end(). Real-API smoke responded in 4.5s; agentic-session smoke in 6.9s; full parity (Anthropic × Codex) in 11.6s.

structuralGates.description: TypeScript compiles cleanly across the new adapter and all callers
All Codex-adapter unit tests pass (event normalizer + canaries)
Capability-honesty canary still passes with codex stub factory included
Codex x Anthropic structural parity scenarios pass (no real API)

realApiGates.description: Real OneShotCompletion returns non-empty text against live Codex API

lastResult.note: Real Codex API returned PONGXYZ after model + stdin fixes landed.

realApiGates.description: Codex x Anthropic parity passes with INSTAR_REAL_API=1 (arithmetic, abort signal)
Real AgenticSessionHeadless spawns, emits a turn-end event, terminates cleanly
